svg.title: Etta curriculum map
svg.desc: Etta curriculum across 12 domains in 4 phases. Phase 1 · Foundations; Phase 2 · Calculus & Linear Algebra; Phase 3 · Classical & Modern Physics; Phase 4 · Astrophysics. Domains: Algebra (56 concepts, phase 1), Pre-Calculus (25 concepts, phase 1), Trigonometry (28 concepts, phase 1), Differential Equations (27 concepts, phase 2), Linear Algebra (30 concepts, phase 2), Multivariable Calculus (33 concepts, phase 2), Single-Variable Calculus (43 concepts, phase 2), Classical Mechanics (33 concepts, phase 3), Electromagnetism (26 concepts, phase 3), Quantum Mechanics (31 concepts, phase 3), Thermodynamics & Statistical Mechanics (23 concepts, phase 3), Astrophysics (47 concepts, phase 4).
